data.name: Elf World Adventure 7
data.detailed_description:
GAMEPLAY:



Elf World Adventure 7 brings even more captivating puzzles and beautiful elf girls to the popular anime-style erotic series. Dive into brand-new levels, reveal charming illustrations, and set your own pace with Easy or Hard difficulty. Let the gentle music and magical fantasy setting guide your adventure.

FEATURES:



  • New levels featuring elegant elf girls in fantasy clothing
  • Difficulty selection: Easy and Hard
  • Steam achievements to customize your profile
  • Cozy fantasy atmosphere with soft music and lovely artwork
  • Easy-to-learn controls and accessible gameplay
data.about_the_game:
GAMEPLAY:



Elf World Adventure 7 brings even more captivating puzzles and beautiful elf girls to the popular anime-style erotic series. Dive into brand-new levels, reveal charming illustrations, and set your own pace with Easy or Hard difficulty. Let the gentle music and magical fantasy setting guide your adventure.

  • Steam achievements to customize your profile

data.short_description: Charming anime-style puzzle game with elf girls, unlockable art, and adjustable difficulty.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 保加利亞文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 匈牙利文, 越南文, 丹麥文, 印尼語, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 簡體中文, 韓文, 荷蘭文, 波蘭文, 俄文, 泰文, 土耳其文, 芬蘭文, 瑞典文, 日文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 (64-bit)
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5-2300
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GeForce GTX 760 or Radeon HD 7850
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 音效卡: DirectX
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 (64-bit)
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5-7400 or AMD Ryzen 3
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GeForce GTX 960 or Radeon R9 380X
  • DirectX: 版本：12
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS: Windows 10 (64-bit)
  • Processor: Intel Core i5-2300
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: GeForce GTX 760 or Radeon HD 7850
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Sound Card: DirectX

  • DirectX: Version 12
